steps.title: Identify the title phrase
steps.content: The blank comes between novel and the title Mexican Gothic. The title directly identifies which novel earned a spot on the best sellers list, so no punctuation should separate the noun from the identifying title.

steps.title: Remove faulty punctuation
steps.content: Choice A opens a parenthesis without closing it. Choice C adds a colon where the preceding words do not form an independent introduction. Choice D uses a comma that wrongly treats the title as extra information. The title should follow novel directly. The answer is B.
